connect_lines: Robot memory is damaged. Operator assistance required.

msg_1.value: Difdl uif mpht! sfqbjs_bddpvou vtfs je: twd_311 ???

missions.title: Decode the distress message
intro: A distress message was stored just before the robot lost control.
It is stored in memory as msg_1
Read it, decode it with a Caesar shift of 1, and submit the decoded message.
hints: Use a loop to go through each character.
Use chr(ord(letter) - 1) to shift a letter backwards.
missions.expected_answer: check the logs! repair_account user id: svc_311 ???
success_lines: Clue found: command logs may reveal what happened.
failure_lines: [JAMBOT-7] Distress message does not match expected recovery output.
